summary: Closed M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001 after PR #197 passed CI, merged to main, and origin/main contained the accepted platform/resolution/localization matrix evidence. The task adds truthful Chromium-supported UI/platform matrix coverage, Windows desktop smoke evidence, and explicit unresolved Edge/Firefox/Windows DPI 150% rows for M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 to carry or resolve.

tests_run.result: CI passed: Quality/Web/Browser Smoke 2m48s; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact 51s.

decisions: Task is CLOSED only after accepted changes entered origin/main via PR #197.
Edge, Firefox, and Windows DPI 150% are unresolved matrix rows, not passed coverage.
M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 must carry or resolve those rows before claiming full platform coverage.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; no release, telemetry, account, cloud-save, commercial, server, multiplayer, sim-rule, content fact, or save migration scope was added.
risks: M7-PLATFORM-EDGE-FIREFOX-UNRESOLVED: Edge and Firefox remain blocked-by-tooling rows until Playwright projects/browser tooling are added and evidence rerun.
M7-WINDOWS-DPI-150-UNRESOLVED: Windows DPI 150% remains a follow-up row until a dedicated DPI matrix harness exists.
M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 must carry or resolve these rows before any full platform coverage claim.
requested_action: Run taskctl ready and start the highest-priority dependency-ready M7 task.
